narrative:
Harrod (precinct in Allen County) has 242 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.6 percentage points.
